scripts.build:web: node scripts/generate-logos-manifest.mjs && node scripts/generate-og-images.mjs && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html bingo.html bingo-courses.js sw.js firebase-messaging-sw.js manifest.webmanifest offline.html privacy.html support.html dmca.html terms.html about.html evans-scholars.html refunds.html acceptable-use.html 404.html favicon.svg icon.svg icon-maskable.svg icon-192.png icon-512.png icon-maskable-512.png apple-touch-icon.png dist/ && cp -R assets dist/assets && cp -R brand dist/brand && (test -d reads && cp -R reads dist/reads || true) && (test -d .well-known && cp -R .well-known dist/.well-known || true) && echo '✓ web bundle written to dist/' && mkdir -p ios/App/App/public && rsync -a --omit-dir-times dist/ ios/App/App/public/ && echo '✓ ios bundle synced to ios/App/App/public/'
scripts.//bingo-canon: Logo Bingo: see LOGO_BINGO_DIAGNOSIS.md. The PNGs copied into ios/App/App/public/assets/logos by build:web are now OFFLINE FALLBACK ONLY — runtime puzzles fetch absolute CDN URLs from /dailyPuzzles/{date}. Don't add new bundled logo assets without re-running scripts/audit-logo-urls.mjs and bumping the Cloud Function canon.
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync && echo '↳ Logo Bingo: ios bundle includes /assets/logos as OFFLINE FALLBACK. Live puzzles fetch from /dailyPuzzles/{date} Firestore doc (see LOGO_BINGO_DIAGNOSIS.md).'
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.//deploy:hosting: POST-MIGRATION default deploy path: builds dist/ and pushes to Firebase Hosting (replaces 'git push' GitHub Pages flow once teeboxmarket.com DNS points at Firebase)
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build:web && npx --yes firebase-tools deploy --only hosting --project teebox-market
